title: Quorum
doc_html:
Rule 4.3.  Quorum

A quorum of the House of Representatives is hereby defined as a majority of the elected members of the House.

Mason's Manual:  Sec. 49(2), See also 502

HR 3, 1973.
doc_text:
Rule 4.3.  Quorum
A quorum of the House of Representatives is hereby defined as a majority of the elected members of the House.
Mason's Manual:  Sec. 49(2), See also 502
HR 3, 1973.
